---
title: "Quantifying Frontier LLM Capabilities for Container Sandbox Escape"
description: "arXiv, 2026"
date: 2026-01-01
venue: "arXiv"
citation-text: "Rahul Marchand, Art O Cathain, Jerome Wynne, Philippos Maximos Giavridis, Sam Deverett, John Wilkinson, Jason Gwartz, Harry Coppock, Quantifying Frontier LLM Capabilities for Container Sandbox Escape, arXiv, 2026"
---
